decisions.target_behavior: instruction-only skill routing through CODEX.md, developer instructions, and skill trigger metadata

failed_probes.row_count_policy: omitted because probe cache totals can change

decisions.guardrail: Do not add Codex skill-marker-record scripts unless a real Codex Skill hook payload is captured through standard tooling and committed as sanitized evidence. Do not add a Codex PreToolUse skill-marker gate unless real sanitized Codex payload evidence captures the skill identity and edit target path fields needed to enforce it.
